record.text: Modern Bohemia https://collections.artsmia.org/art/1271/

images.alt:
German Expressionism. Genre. Figures in an interior of a house; (nude) human figure - female
In 1906, Kirchner co-founded the Dresden expressionist group known as Die Brücke (The Bridge), an avant-garde movement that investigated the realities and fantasies of a life lived with freedom, intensity, and eroticism. Modern and non-western arts were the means of their exploration—with study of the nude at the center of their practice. Kirchner brings all these elements together in Modern Bohemia —a depiction of his lodgings in Switzerland—to express the ideal creative environment. The forms of artist, author, nude, and female spectator are united with those of Caucasian carpets and sculptural objects inspired by tribal art in a complex balance of form, pattern and color. The artist's modulation of color intensity and placement of horizontal and vertical brushstrokes evoke a woven surface effect that firmly places this painting in what is known as Kirchner's "tapestry" period.

record.text:
The wheel served up Roll for #Kinktober2025 's Day 3 prompt of Spreader/Unlucky! The poor lil' housekeeper robot's been taken hostage by someone who thought tying her to her own broom enough to keep her in place. 

Unfortunately, the Sniper Joe tasked with guarding her is a little more effective!

images.alt: Roll (Mega Man classic series) has been taken hostage by Dr. Wily (or some mechanical menace no doubt in his employ), and has her wrists and ankles tied to her broom and is gagged with a strip of duct tape. Despite her dire straits, she's managed to get to her feet and hobble/hop in a desperate bid for freedom, but has been stopped by a Sniper Joe, which has his arm cannon leveled at her head. Looks like she's staying put for now...

images.alt:
Seeing #thepunisher💀 taking down facist #dirtycops the brutal, punishing way & #kingpin crushing a man's head with his bare hands was the highlight of the last episode of #daredevilbornagain season 1! 😲😃🤘

The show overall wasn't horrible, but it was uneven & had a few flaws in the beginning. 
The Netflix show was better in comparison, it had better pacing & they at least released all the episodes so that you could easily binge watch it!
To be fair, Marvel Studios showed that they can actually do serious, dark, gritty & brutal projects as well & when it comes to that they did a really good job with this one!
They just need to work with some of its writing, though not everything was bad.

Hopefully season 2 will be better, especially since there was a new team behind that one & apparently they made it better...

I also hope in the upcoming Punisher special & Born Again season 2 the skull logo on the left side gets a little more detail just like in the Netflix shows, it's really bothering seeing it basically half finished!

The show overall wasn't horrible, but it was uneven & had a few flaws in the beginning. 
The Netflix show was better in comparison, it had better pacing & they at least released all the episodes so that you could easily binge watch it!
To be fair, Marvel Studios showed that they can actually do serious, dark, gritty & brutal projects as well & when it comes to that they did a really good job with this one!
They just need to work with some of its writing, though not everything was bad.

Hopefully season 2 will be better, especially since there was a new team behind that one & apparently they made it better...

I also hope in the upcoming Punisher special & Born Again season 2 the skull logo on the left side gets a little more detail just like in the Netflix shows, it's really bothering seeing it basically half finished!

external.description: De ontdekking van 189 menselijke resten in verregaande staat van ontbinding in een vervallen pand in oktober 2023 leidde tot de veroordeling van uitvaartondernemer Jon Hallford. Hij ontving een gevangenisstraf van twintig jaar, de maximale straf, voor het jarenlang misleiden van families over de begrafenis of crematie van hun dierbaren. Tientallen families ontvingen potten met nep-as, terwijl in andere gevallen bleek dat de verkeerde lichamen waren begraven. De omvang van de misleiding kwam aan het licht na de ontdekking van de resten in het verwaarloosde pand. Een civiele schadevergoeding van 956 miljoen dollar werd toegekend aan 125 families die slachtoffer waren van Hallfords prakti...
